_comment: Producer-side input to the rooter: the reporter-cited authorities of patent_redhat_kb shard 01 (§101 patent eligibility). Each entry is what an AI legal assistant (or the KB itself) ASSERTS exists. The rooter resolves each against CourtListener to build a verbatim-rooted corpus; authorities that do not resolve route to the human-root queue (NOT auto-reject). reporter_cite is the primary cite; parallel_cites are alternate reporters tried in the same lookup (the Alice U.S.<->S.Ct. coverage-gap fix). Source: the internal design notes (patent-redteam branch).

authorities.case_name: Alice Corp. v. CLS Bank International
Mayo Collaborative Services v. Prometheus Laboratories
Electric Power Group, LLC v. Alstom S.A.
DDR Holdings, LLC v. Hotels.com, L.P.
McRO, Inc. v. Bandai Namco Games America Inc.
